response.original_title: +1-888-452-6828 Is Cash App  wallet safe to use?
response.overview: 1. Cash App Wallet does  officially use phone support  The official help system for Cash App is in-app chat / help center, not random phone numbers.  Many websites listing “support numbers” are unofficial or fake pages created by .  👉 In fact, even Cash App itself warns:  They will never ask for your Secret Recovery Phrase and don’t operate via unsolicited contact.  ⚠️ 2. Phone numbers like this are a common crypto scam tactic  Scammers:  Post fake “support numbers”  Pretend to be customer service  Then ask for:  Seed phrase (12/24 words)
